name: io.github.str-consulting/pacer-mcp
description: Pacer revenue-management API as MCP tools: portfolios, pacing, market metrics, Guesty, briefs.

environmentVariables.name: PACER_CORE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the pacer/core mc app. Defaults to production (mc.pacerrev.io).

environmentVariables.name: PACER_CORE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Personal access token (pat_...) issued via `pacer pat create`. Requires the employee role or higher.
